---
title: "Under Maintenance"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-screen .text-center style="padding: 80px 0; background-color: #f8f9fa;"}

# ⚙️
## Section Temporarily Unavailable

We are currently updating our interactive visualizations.

[Return to Home](index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 20px;"}

:::

---

### Why is this page offline?

To ensure the highest scientific standards, we periodically take the interactive tools offline to:

* **Validate Data:** Verify that the pressure-level interpolations match the latest climate records.
* **Optimize Performance:** Improve the loading speed of the Plotly visualizations.
* **Enhance Security:** Update the underlying Python environment for the Streamlit app.

*Thank you for your patience as we improve these research tools.*

<style>
  h2 {
    color: #6c757d;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background-color: #0056b3;
    border-color: #0056b3;
  }
</style>
